positive: Stylized, whimsical depiction of various woodland creatures—fox, deer, owl, squirrel—intertwined in a playful, circular composition. The characters should be drawn with thick, clean black outlines (line art aesthetic), filled with soft, pastel watercolor washes and earthy tones (sage green, terracotta, dusty blue). The composition must be centered, highly contrasting, and designed to look excellent as a repeat pattern or single patch print. Use a minimalist, modern bohemian folk art style. Flat background with selective depth. Perfect for screen printing on natural fibers. Rule of thirds composition for main groups. Highly detailed elements but clean lines.
negative: photorealistic, 3d render, messy, blur, grainy, text, logo, watermark, signature, cropped, out of frame, bad anatomy, disfigured, extra limbs, noisy, bokeh, jpeg artifacts, noise
